payload.title: 2022 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan
payload.description: MTA Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan listing recurring and specific agenda items by month from November 2022 through October 2023.

payload.description: A biannual report to the Committee on Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.
Positive Train Control (PTC) implementation update for LIRR and MNR.
Retail development project at Grand Central Terminal.

tool_args.label: November 2022 - Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan

payload.description: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan - A biannual report to the Committee on Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.
2023 Final Proposed Budget - The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2023.
2023 Proposed Committee Work Plan - The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2023 that will address initiatives to be reported throughout the year.

Diversity & EEO Report – 3rd Quarter 2022 - A quarterly report providing data on key Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts, such as composition of the agency's workforce, new hires, and discrimination complaints.
Review of Committee Charter - Annual review and approval of the MNR Committee Charter.

tool_args.label: January 2023 - Approval of 2023 Committee Work Plan & Track Program Quarterly Update

payload.description: Approval of 2023 Committee Work Plan (Committee Chairs & Members); Track Program Quarterly Update (Engineering)

tool_args.label: February 2023 - Adopted Budget/Financial Plan 2022 & Annual Operating Results

payload.description: Adopted Budget/Financial Plan 2022 (Finance); 2022 Annual Operating Results (Operations)

tool_args.label: March 2023 - Annual Elevator & Escalator Report & Diversity/EEO Report 4th Quarter 2022

payload.description: Annual Elevator & Escalator Report (Engineering); Diversity/EEO Report – 4th Quarter 2022 (Diversity and EEO)

tool_args.label: April 2023 - Final Review of 2022 Operating Budget Results & Annual Ridership Report

payload.description: Final Review of 2022 Operating Budget Results (Finance); 2022 Annual Ridership Report (Operations Planning & Analysis)

tool_args.label: May 2023 - Track Program Quarterly Update & LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update

payload.description: Track Program Quarterly Update (Engineering); LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update (Presidents)

tool_args.label: June 2023 - Way Ahead Strategic Plan & Diversity/EEO Report 1st Quarter 2023

payload.description: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan (Operations Support & Organizational Resiliency); Diversity/EEO Report – 1st Quarter 2023 (Diversity and EEO)

tool_args.label: July 2023 - Grand Central Terminal Retail Development & Track Program Quarterly Update

payload.description: Grand Central Terminal Retail Development (MTA Real Estate); Track Program Quarterly Update (Engineering)

tool_args.label: September 2023 - 2024 Preliminary Budget & 2023 Mid-Year Forecast & Diversity/EEO Report 2nd Quarter 2023

payload.description: 2024 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment) (Finance); 2023 Mid-Year Forecast (Finance); Diversity/EEO Report – 2nd Quarter 2023 (Diversity and EEO)

tool_args.label: October 2023 - 2024 Preliminary Budget, LIRR/MNR PTC Update & Track Program Quarterly Update

payload.description: 2024 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment) (Finance); LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update (Presidents); Track Program Quarterly Update (Engineering)

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Safety Report

payload.claim_text: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
payload.subject: Police Activity Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key operating and performance statistics and indicators.
payload.subject: Operations Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast both on an accrual and cash basis.
payload.subject: Finance Report

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that includes a comparison of actual monthly ticket sales, ridership and revenues with the budget and prior year results.
payload.subject: Ridership Report

payload.claim_text: A biannual report to the Committee on Metro-North's progress in setting the standard for safety, reliability and innovation in the delivery of excellent customer service.
payload.subject: Way Ahead Strategic Plan

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.subject: Procurements

tool_args.label: Way Ahead Strategic Plan - November 2022 Report

payload.description: The Way Ahead Strategic Plan is reported to the Committee in November 2022 as a biannual progress report.

payload.description: Progress on Way Ahead Strategic Plan is reported to the Committee in June 2023.

payload.description: Grand Central Terminal Retail Development is scheduled for July 2023.
The 2022 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan was published by the Metropolitan Transportation Authority.
The Metro-North Railroad Committee is part of Metro-North Railroad.
